name: Lobster Radio LLM-Wiki
description: LLM-maintained knowledge base for the Lobster Radio project
rules: Keep pages focused - one concept per page
Always link to related pages using [[WikiLinks]]
Update incrementally - when code changes, patch the affected sections rather than rewriting everything
Include both 'what' (how it works) and 'why' (why we made this decision)
Keep content concise - prefer shorter explanations over verbose ones
Add citations to the git commit or PR when a change is significant
